Back
Supermarket Simulator Guide

Achievements Guide

All 15 Steam achievements and how to unlock them.

And the best store in town is...

Reach a 5-star store rating.

Focus on cleanliness, variety, and fast checkout. Takes consistent effort over multiple in-game days.

The greatest!

Earn $10,000 in a single day.

Requires a large store with high-margin products and efficient staff. Alcohol and electronics help push revenue over the threshold.

Finally

Hire your first employee.

Unlocks early. Use the hiring terminal when you have enough daily profit to cover wages.

Economy 101

Make your first profit.

Story-related. Happens naturally on day 1 or 2 if you price items above cost.

Expansion

Expand your store for the first time.

Purchase a floor expansion from the upgrade menu. Save up $2,000-$5,000 depending on expansion size.

Big Boss

Hire 5 employees.

Hire cashiers, restockers, security, and cleaners until you reach 5 total staff members.

Online Orders

Complete 10 online delivery orders.

Use the in-game computer to accept online orders, then pack and deliver them personally.

License to Sell

Purchase your first product license.

Alcohol and tobacco licenses are available from the licensing menu. Costs vary by region.

Fully Stocked

Have every shelf in your store filled at once.

Order enough stock to fill all shelf slots simultaneously. Easier with fewer shelves.

Clean Store

Maintain 100% cleanliness for a full day.

Hire a cleaner or mop constantly. No spills or trash can be present from open to close.

No Thieves Allowed

Catch 10 shoplifters.

Stand near high-value items and watch for suspicious behavior. Security staff speed this up.

Decorator

Place 20 decorations in your store.

Buy plants, posters, and lighting from the decor catalog. Cheap way to boost store atmosphere.

Local Supplier

Buy goods from the local market 10 times.

Drive to the local market and purchase items directly instead of using the online supplier.

Rich

Have $50,000 in your account at once.

Save aggressively. Do not expand or hire until you hit the threshold.

Perfectionist

Achieve a perfect day with 5 stars, max cleanliness, and no shoplifters escaping.

Late-game challenge. Requires a well-trained team and attentive management.

Note: Achievement names and conditions are based on community reports and Steam profile data. Some unlock conditions may have changed with updates. If you find a discrepancy, check the Steam Community Hub for the latest patch notes.

Related Guides

Beginner Tips

Essential tips to unlock achievements faster with efficient early-game play.

Money Making Guide

Earn $10,000 in a day and unlock the hardest achievements.

Staff Management

Master hiring to unlock staff-related achievements quickly.
